iti73:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti73:2.1:
“Monks, formless phenomena are more peaceful than forms;
cessation, more peaceful than formless phenomena.”
iti73:3.2: and those standing in the formless,
iti73:4.2: not taking a stance in formless things,
iti73:4.4: are people who’ve left death behind.
iti73:5.1: Having touched with his body the deathless property free
iti73:5.5: the Rightly Self-awakened One teaches the state
